ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT ($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CVE_Enagement_Validation_Rules__c), OR(ISPICKVAL(CVE_Stage__c, "4-Engagement Completed"), ISPICKVAL(CVE_Stage__c, "5-Stalled / Discontinued"), ISPICKVAL(CVE_Stage__c, "6-CVE Not Required")), OR(ISPICKVAL(Collaboration__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(BVA_Echo_back__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(Timeliness__c, '')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Following fields are required at CVE stage 4 and above: Collaboration, BVA Echo-back, Timeliness.
